trained_on: Gladstone CD4 activation-transfer errors of the per-condition mean predictor, all folds

feature_spec.description: prediction-time features only, no true-effect quantity (leakage-safe)
feature_spec.target: per-perturbation transfer error, 1 - Pearson on the source-training high-variance gene set

honest_scope: Reliability estimator. It scores which predictions to trust, not which genes are important. Gains are modest on noisy data (see manuscript). Never retrain on user truth.
